encoding_note: The CSV is in the original UCI multi-row-per-patient fixed format (not standard CSV) with encoding issues. The outcome column `num` is 0 (no disease) vs 1-4 (disease present) — binarize as num>0 = disease. Site variable distinguishes 4 collection sites (Cleveland, Hungarian, VA, Switzerland). Sex (0=female, 1=male) is the primary stratum. Age would need binning. Data requires preprocessing to extract tabular rows with standard column assignment per UCI documentation (14 standard attributes).
